channel.title: LeetCode on My blog
channel.description: Recent content in LeetCode on My blog

item.title: Common Java Operations For LeetCode
item.description: At the Summer of 2022, I converted my main programming language from C++ to Java. This is because some Java’s great features are appealing to me and Java is also widely used in software development industry. In this post, I will put some commonly used Java operations for doing leetCode.
